SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.backbone

Interface IBackboneMap<K,O>

Type Parameters:
K - the type of keys maintained by this map
O - the type of mapped values
All Superinterfaces:
IBackboneObject
All Known Implementing Classes:
EmbeddedMap, EmbeddedMapCache
public interface IBackboneMap<K,O> extends IBackboneObject
The IBackboneMap interface provides a set of methods for managing a map. A map is an object that maps keys to values. A map cannot contain duplicate keys; each key can map to at most one value.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clear()
    Removes all of the mappings from this map.
    boolean
    containsKey(K termid)
    Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
    boolean
    fastPutIfAbsent(K key, O value)
    If the specified key is not already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
    boolean
    fastPutIfExists(K id, O t)
    If the specified key is already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
    long
    fastRemove(K sessionId)
    Removes the mapping for a key from this map if it is present.
    boolean
    fastReplace(K sessionId, O s)
    Replaces the entry for the specified key only if it is currently mapped to some value.
    O
    get(K termId)
    Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key.
    boolean
    isExists()
    Checks if the map exists.
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of key-value mappings in this map.
    Collection<O>
    values()
    Returns a Collection view of the values contained in this map.

    Methods inherited from interface com.nib.supernaut.backbone.IBackboneObject

    getKey, getName

  • Method Details

    • clear

      void clear()
      Removes all of the mappings from this map.

    • fastPutIfAbsent

      boolean fastPutIfAbsent(K key, O value)
      If the specified key is not already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
      Parameters:
      key - the key with which the specified value is to be associated
      value - the value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      true if the value was associated with the key, false if the key was already associated with a value

    • fastRemove

      long fastRemove(K sessionId)
      Removes the mapping for a key from this map if it is present.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - key whose mapping is to be removed from the map
      Returns:
      the previous value associated with the key, or null if there was no mapping for the key

    • get

      O get(K termId)
      Returns the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key.
      Parameters:
      termId - the key whose associated value is to be returned
      Returns:
      the value to which the specified key is mapped, or null if this map contains no mapping for the key

    • fastReplace

      boolean fastReplace(K sessionId, O s)
      Replaces the entry for the specified key only if it is currently mapped to some value.
      Parameters:
      sessionId - key with which the specified value is associated
      s - value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      true if the value was replaced

    • values

      Collection<O> values()
      Returns a Collection view of the values contained in this map.
      Returns:
      a collection view of the values contained in this map

    • fastPutIfExists

      boolean fastPutIfExists(K id, O t)
      If the specified key is already associated with a value, associate it with the given value.
      Parameters:
      id - the key with which the specified value is to be associated
      t - the value to be associated with the specified key
      Returns:
      true if the value was associated with the key, false if the key was not already associated with a value

    • containsKey

      boolean containsKey(K termid)
      Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
      Parameters:
      termid - key whose presence in this map is to be tested
      Returns:
      true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key

    • size

      int size()
      Returns the number of key-value mappings in this map.
      Returns:
      the number of key-value mappings in this map

    • isExists

      boolean isExists()
      Checks if the map exists.
      Returns:
      true if the map exists, false otherwise
